  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BaseAction<S,​R>
    BaseAction is the unified base class for all action phases.
    BaseCheck<R>
    BaseCheck is the unified base class for all verification phases.
    BaseConfirm<I,​S,​R>
    BaseConfirm for TDT pattern - independent implementation Similar to BaseGiven but for table-driven testing
    BaseDescribe<I,​S,​R>
    BaseDescribe extends BaseSetup for Describe-It pattern.
    BaseExpected<R>
    BaseExpected extends BaseCheck for TDT pattern.
    BaseGiven<I,​S,​R>
    BaseGiven extends BaseSetup to support BDD pattern.
    BaseIt<R>
    BaseIt extends BaseAction for Describe-It pattern.
    BaseSetup<I,​S,​R>
    BaseSetup is the unified base class for all setup phases.
    BaseShould<R>
    BaseShould extends BaseAction for TDT pattern.
    BaseSuite  
    BaseThen<R>
    BaseThen extends BaseCheck to support BDD pattern.
    BaseValue<I,​S,​R>
    BaseValue extends BaseSetup for TDT pattern.
    BaseWhen<S,​R>
    BaseWhen extends BaseAction to support BDD pattern.
    Default
